name: Baked Garlic Quail
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut quail in half through the centers.
2. Combine garlic, sambal oelek, honey, soy sauce, brown sugar, and oil in a bowl. Add quail, stir well; cover and refrigerate overnight.
3. Just before serving, place quail on a rack over a baking dish. Bake in a moderate oven for 15 minutes, then increase the temperature to hot and cook further 10 minutes or until quail are crisp and tender.
4. Makes 4 servings.
5. Quail can be prepared up to 2 days ahead.
6. Storage: Covered, refrigerated. Freeze: Uncooked quail suitable.
7. Microwave: Not suitable.
